description: pose_edit far plus screen_replay tablet edge+gamma cues

variation_requests.description: Change head pose (yaw/pitch/roll) while keeping identity
Screen replay capture — simulate a photo of a face displayed on a tablet screen photographed by a physical camera
variation_requests.detail: Generate a realistic screen-replay image: a face shown on a tablet screen and photographed with a camera. Must visibly exhibit at least 2 of these cues: Edge / crop cues — screen borders, bezel reflections, or cropping consistent with display capture; Gamma / contrast shift — colour/brightness characteristics of display capture. The face must be the dominant object (large enough for reliable face detection) and must remain matchable to the seed identity (high similarity score).
